MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Reconsideration of Order for santions issued on 917/2002 in the amount of $250.00, to plaintiff's and defendant's counsel is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection the tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Sanctions are ordered vacated as to each party. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Patricia M. Evezich. (212)
